overall.description: A first-person walk along a foggy urban waterfront promenade at night, passing a large traditional Asian gate illuminated with vivid red lighting, with modern skyscrapers looming in the background. The footage appears to be from a video game (likely Ghostwire: Tokyo), featuring atmospheric volumetric fog and cinematic neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade alongside illuminated red gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved waterfront path, approaching and moving alongside the large red-lit traditional gate structure

entered.detail: large traditional Asian gate structure with vivid red neon illumination and multiple vertical pillars
low stone block wall with decorative metal railing on top, running along the right side of the path
black metal railing running along the left side of the pathway
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall contemporary buildings with illuminated windows visible through the fog in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a foggy waterfront promenade at night. A massive traditional gate illuminated with red light dominates the right side of the frame, while modern skyscrapers loom in the misty background. The pathway is bordered by a stone wall on the right and metal railing on the left, with palm trees visible in the darkness.

events.description: the red illuminated gate structure passes out of view to the right, revealing more of the open waterfront and city lights on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the path as the gate structure recedes behind, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: open view of the water and distant city lights becoming visible as the gate moves out of the way

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking past the red gate, the structure gradually exits the frame to the right, opening up the view to the waterfront on the left. The foggy atmosphere persists with the stone wall and railing continuing alongside the path, while the modern city skyline remains visible in the background through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a foggy waterfront promenade that shifts from the presence of a massive traditional monument to an open view of a misty city skyline. It begins with a walk past a towering traditional gate bathed in vivid red light, which dominates the right side of the frame against a backdrop of looming skyscrapers. As the camera advances, the red structure gradually recedes and exits the frame to the right, while the path remains bordered by a stone wall and metal railings. The scene then opens up to reveal more of the dark waterfront and palm trees on the left, with the modern skyline persisting through the dense haze. Finally, the perspective settles into a steady glide forward, leaving the gate behind as the atmospheric fog envelops the urban landscape.
